case_title: JOHN L. RUBIO VS. JONI TOY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUBIO, JOHN L.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF JOHN L. RUBIO IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS ROBERT MORTIMER. DEFENDANT JONI TOY IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUBIO, JOHN L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOY, JONI AKA JOANNIE TOY $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RUBIO, JOHN L. AS TO DEFENDANT TOY, JONI AKA JOANNIE TOY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUBIO, JOHN L. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-12-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-11-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF GRANTED**
